title: Question: bug in fst_config.h
body:
--- Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong** Original Redmine Message: 2711 from https://www.veripool.org --- "if endif" is need for MINGW.
but already 'HAVE_ALLOCA_H' is defined previous line.
*-#define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1-* ``` /* Define to 1 if you have and it should be used (not on Ultrix). */ #define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1 #if !defined(__MINGW32__) 1. define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1 #endif ``` It must be deleted. Please check again this.
code_blocks:
/* Define to 1 if you have <alloca.h> and it should be used (not on Ultrix). */
#define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1
#if !defined(__MINGW32__)
1. define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1
#endif
